{ 
  "perspective": "Assessment Science",
  "position": "for",
  "argument": "Validate psychometric soundness of the AURA assessment engine by checking IRT 3PL parameters, question pool size, DIF analysis, CAT stopping rules, and temporal decay rationale to ensure a reliable and unbiased assessment.",
  "strongest_counter": "Lack of real data for calibration may impact the accuracy of IRT 3PL parameters.",

argument: Validate psychometric soundness of the AURA assessment engine by checking IRT 3PL parameters, question pool size, DIF analysis, CAT stopping rules, and temporal decay rationale to ensure a reliable and unbiased assessment.
strongest_counter: Lack of real data for calibration may impact the accuracy of IRT 3PL parameters.
